name: Publicly exposed serverless with high privileges can be invoked by unauthenticated users
description: Cloud Function or Cloud Run service is publicly accessible without authentication and runs with high privileges, allowing anyone to invoke it and potentially abuse its permissions
remediation: 1. Enable IAM-based authentication for the function. 2. Restrict ingress to internal traffic only. 3. Create dedicated service account with minimal permissions. 4. Use VPC connectors for private access.
